name: R-4 react templates: three templates (vitest.react.config.ts, playwright.config.ts, size-limit.config.js) ship together per §9 R-4
command: n=0; for t in vitest.react.config.ts playwright.config.ts size-limit.config.js; do [ -s "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/templates/$t" ] && n=$((n+1)); done; [ "$n" -eq 3 ] && echo "three_templates=$n" 1>&2
